name: Credit/Real-Rate Stress-Triggered Rotation into the 2022 Winners (HYG+SPY trend gate -> DBC/UUP/GLD)
oneLineRationale: Faithfully reproduces on REAL_OHLCV (2022 Jan-Oct +29.5% net, all 6 inputs cached, no look-ahead) and ships trivially on a daily Vercel cron, but the red-team kills the regime-hedge thesis: Mar-2020 is -14.25% (held GLD into the liquidation, not the claimed 'flat-to-modest positive'), TRAIN<=2021 Sharpe is 0.077 so ~all P&L is the single 2022 design window, the -0.45 corr is fabricated (realized ~+0.01, +0.08 on down-SPY days), it breaches its own <1%/yr calm-drag falsifier (2021 -3.28%), and the repo's own regime-stability.md already tested 'long commodities/dollar in 2022' as a book overlay and REJECTED it (combined OOS +0.03, made 2018 worse) -- so BUILD_AFTER_FIX only as an honestly-relabeled <=8% 2022-grind tilt with an AND-gate + persistence filter and paired with the VXX leg, NOT as a -0.45 crash hedge.

name: Min-Variance Defensive Tilt (USMV/SPLV RS gate + inverse-vol cross-asset min-var basket)
oneLineRationale: REAL_OHLCV and Vercel-shippable, but as-specced it's 3/4 dead weight around 1/4 good idea: Leg 1 (75% of budget) self-falsifies (net-of-beta alpha +0.09%/yr t=0.06, full Sharpe 0.85<always-SPY 0.87, worse than always-USMV in Mar-2020), full-sleeve low-vol R^2=0.543 and 60/40 corr 0.83 (spec claimed 0.45), and mechanism claims are factually wrong (SHY gets ~0% inverse-vol weight all 2022; gate is ON in USMV 86% of 2019 when USMV lagged). The only genuine piece, trend-gated Leg 2 (2022 +8.2% Sharpe 0.94, corr 0.13, trend filter load-bearing +11pt), is under-funded at 25% AND is a near-duplicate of the already-shipped cross_asset_trend sleeve (4/5 assets in CROSS_ASSET_ETFS), double-counting the same 2022 USD/gold trade that research/red-team.md already RESEARCH_ONLY'd. BUILD_AFTER_FIX: drop the RS gate, cap/promote Leg 2 or fold it into cross_asset_trend; do not ship as written.

name: Stock-Bond Correlation Regime Overlay (commodity/dollar + short-bond, gated on positive SPY-TLT corr)
oneLineRationale: Verified the exact-spec backtest in-repo: the 60d daily-return SPY-TLT corr is a ~9-month-lagging off-switch that misses the entire H1-2022 stocks-and-bonds-down leg (fires 55/251 days, almost all Q4), delivers ~+0.19% in 2022 standalone (cannot lift book Sharpe from -0.95, falsifier #4 fails outright), and then bleeds every post-2020 year (2023 fires 120 days and loses -0.82%; all post-2020 sub-period Sharpes negative); the spec's central +0.5/+0.7 corr premise is false (60d peak ~+0.32), it directly shorts the TLT/GLD that tailhedge holds long (friendly fire) and overlaps crossasset's commodity/dollar legs, and the repo already REJECTED this exact CTA idea twice with managedfutures.ts left unregistered — honest REAL_OHLCV and trivially Vercel-cron-able, but empirically refuted on its one and only 2022-fix claim, so CUT.

name: Stock-Bond-Correlation-Gated Inflation Ballast (CORR-INFL)
oneLineRationale: Faithful no-look-ahead run of the exact spec INVERTS the central claim: the 60d SPY-IEF correlation is a lagging state variable, so the gate first fires 2022-06-15 (six days AFTER DBC's 06-09 top), buying the inflation basket into a -16.2% collapse; 2022 = -7.34% net (reproduces, not offsets, the ARMS loss), the spec's own falsifier (a) fails with negative-and-significant timing value (gate-ON -0.13% vs OFF +1.10%), full-sample net gain is ~100% GLD with 7.65% cost drag, and the only honest repair (drop gate -> CTA trend) is already tested-and-rejected for this ETF universe; backtestable and Vercel-ready but loses money in its one target regime.

name: Gated Short-Vol VRP Carry (SVXY, term-structure de-grossed)
oneLineRationale: Faithfully backtested on the repo's own cache, 2022 = -3.99% (worse than ungated SVXY -6.22%), failing its own #1 falsifier; spec's factual premises are false (VIX9D/VIX backwardation 38% of 2022, VIX>=30 on 19%, FULL duty cycle only 48% not >80%), corr to SPY ~0.37 (short-vol = long-equity beta that falls WITH stocks), the carry engine vanishes post-2018 deleverage with pre-2018 -1x splice inflating it, and it re-attempts the explicitly-rejected SVXY-vol-carry mandate (red-team.md L35) — the only real merit (the de-gross tail gate) already exists for free in regime.vixTermRatio, so it caps at RESEARCH_ONLY as a risk-off signal, not a funded income sleeve.

name: Inflation-Regime Overlay + Bond-Leg Gate (the surgical 2022 fix)
oneLineRationale: Honestly REAL_OHLCV and Vercel-shippable, but the faithful backtest self-falsifies on BOTH falsifier legs: the lagging 63d-corr gate first fires 2022-08-25 (not ~Mar), missing the entire H1 stocks-and-bonds-down crash so 2022 Sharpe is NEGATIVE (-0.26 overlay), and it leaks badly in calm (ON 32-36% of 2023-25 vs 17% in 2022, bleeding -0.85/-2.14 Sharpe) — and its sole novelty, the surgical bond-leg gate, is a mechanical no-op: meta.ts:63 longOnly + engine.ts:213 clamp discard negative weights, crossAssetTrend holds TLT/IEF only when uptrending (opposite of RATES-UP), tailHedge never holds IEF, and managedfutures (the only net-short sleeve) is not in the registry, so it cancels phantom exposure; fixes are structural not parametric, below the BUILD_AFTER_FIX bar.

name: Synthetic Collar Overlay (VIX-ETP financed): de-grossed equity + gated short-vol carry + convex tail wing
oneLineRationale: Faithful sims (scripts/backtest/_redteam_collar_overlay.ts + _oos.ts) reproduce exactly: it FAILS its own falsifier (b) in the regime it was built to fix (2022 -18.9% = SPY, carry leg -0.10% with the VIX<25 gate OFF 63% of the year, avg g=0.71 not 0.4-0.5), the collar-asymmetry probe inverts (down-beta 0.529 > up-beta 0.467; TLT beta -0.10), the vol legs are net -1.90pp full-sample, and a trivial static 70/30 SPY/SHY dominates it everywhere (2022 -13.6%, 2018Q4 -9.2%, FULL 207%/0.89/-24.0) except the single Mar-2020 wing rescue — and red-team.md line 35 already REJECTED SVXY vol-carry for blow-up risk and the leverage<=1 mandate, so this re-attempts a rejected idea; honestly backtestable but does not earn BUILD.

name: SVXY VRP Carry with VIX3M/VIX Backwardation Kill-Switch (vol-scaled, fast-out/fast-in)
oneLineRationale: REAL_OHLCV and daily-feasible, but a one-regime short-vol carry sleeve that trips its own falsifiers (I reproduced backwardation leading only 9/15=60% of VIX>=35 spikes, under the 70% bar), markets fabricated naked-SVXY headlines (+181% vs honest ~+35% vol-scaled), admits improves2022:false (sits in cash May-Nov 2022), shares the book's short-vol tail (+0.46 SPY corr), runs on a spliced -1x/-0.5x SVXY cache (143.64->24.48 on 2018-02-06), needs VIX3M wired (no call site passes ^VIX3M), and the repo already excludes vol_premium from the funded book.

name: Stock-Bond-Correlation De-Gross Switch (positive-corr regime → cash + dollar/commodity)
oneLineRationale: Independently verified on cached OHLCV: 60d corr(SPY,TLT) was negative all H1-2022, first fires 2022-10-10 after SPY -23.8%/TLT -30%, basket -7.0% vs TLT -0.7% on fired days, and it fires 59-61% in calm 2023/24 as a bull-market tax — self-falsified on all three falsifier legs and redundant with an already-CUT de-gross overlay; REAL_OHLCV + Vercel-ready cannot rescue a falsified, inverted mechanism.
